name: Rapido Check Cashing
description_short: Rapido Check Cashing provided check cashing and financial services in Irving, TX, but is currently closed and no longer operating.
description_long: Rapido Check Cashing was a check-cashing service located at 3509 N Beltline Rd in Irving, Texas. The company operated under the Nayeb Group umbrella and served the Dallas-Fort Worth area with financial transaction services. Based on available information, the business offered standard check-cashing services typical of the industry, providing customers with quick access to funds from checks without requiring a traditional bank account. The company maintained contact information including a phone line (469-565-8910) and fax services (469-565-8912) for customer inquiries and transactions. However, the business is no longer in operation and is marked as CLOSED on its profile. This closure means that customers who previously relied on Rapido Check Cashing for check-cashing services, money orders, or related financial services must now seek alternatives in the Irving area. The limited online presence and lack of detailed service descriptions on the company website suggest it operated as a small, local check-cashing establishment rather than a regional or national chain. For consumers in the Irving area who need check-cashing services, this closure represents the loss of one local option in what remains a viable segment of alternative financial services for unbanked and underbanked populations.
pros: Local Irving, TX location provided convenient access for area residents
Maintained both phone and fax contact options for customer service
Operated as part of Nayeb Group, suggesting organizational backing
cons: PERMANENTLY CLOSED — no longer operational or accepting customers
Minimal online presence and service details provided on website
No information about fees, check limits, or service terms available
No customer reviews or ratings accessible to evaluate service quality
best_for: Historical reference only — no longer serving customers
Researchers studying closed check-cashing businesses in Texas
diagnosis: Rapido Check Cashing is permanently closed and cannot serve any customers. Consumers in Irving, TX who need check-cashing services should seek alternative providers, as this location is no longer operational.
services: Bill payment services (service no longer available)
